categories.name: Luxury Lodges
categories.shortDescription: Opulent lodges perched on kopjes and crater rims, offering infinity pools, gourmet dining, and uninterrupted views of the African wilderness.
categories.imageAlt: Luxury safari lodge deck overlooking the savanna

categories.name: Tented Camps
categories.shortDescription: Canvas elegance in the heart of the bush — king-size beds, en-suite bathrooms, and the sounds of the wild just beyond your zippered door.
categories.imageAlt: Luxury tented camp at golden hour in the bush

categories.name: Bush Retreats
categories.shortDescription: Intimate, off-grid sanctuaries for those seeking solitude. Star-lit dinners, campfire stories, and complete immersion in untamed nature.
categories.imageAlt: Remote bush camp beneath the Tanzanian sky

categories.name: Private Villas
categories.shortDescription: Exclusive beachfront villas and private estates — your own slice of paradise with dedicated staff and tailor-made experiences.
categories.imageAlt: Private beachfront villa on the Zanzibar coast

groups.name: Singita
groups.shortDescription: Iconic ultra-luxury lodges and private villas on vast private concessions along the western Serengeti corridor.
groups.description: Singita Grumeti offers an unrivalled standard of safari hospitality across exclusive-use lodges, tented camps and private villas on a 350,000-acre private concession adjoining Serengeti National Park. Expect refined interiors, private guides, wellness spas and front-row seats to the Great Migration without the crowds.

groups.name: Asilia Africa
groups.shortDescription: Award-winning, low-impact camps and lodges crafted for immersive wildlife encounters across Tanzania and Kenya.
groups.description: Asilia Africa operates thoughtfully designed bush camps and lodges in Tanzania's most celebrated wilderness areas, including the Ngorongoro highlands, Serengeti and southern parks. Their philosophy balances authentic safari adventure with responsible tourism.

groups.name: Wilderness
groups.shortDescription: Conservation-led safaris with exclusive camps in Tanzania's remote southern and western wilderness.
groups.description: Wilderness brings decades of conservation expertise to Tanzania through intimate camps in Ruaha, Nyerere (Selous) and the Mahale Mountains. Guests enjoy private concessions, walking safaris, boat excursions and chimpanzee trekking.

groups.name: Elewana Collection
groups.shortDescription: Elegant lodges and tented camps spanning Tanzania's northern circuit, from coffee estates to baobab-dotted plains.
groups.description: The Elewana Collection curates a seamless northern Tanzania journey through characterful lodges and luxury tented camps including plantation-style retreats near Arusha and tree-house suites overlooking Tarangire's elephant herds.

groups.name: Serena Safari Lodges
groups.shortDescription: Established safari lodges blending East African heritage architecture with reliable comfort on the northern circuit.
groups.description: Serena Safari Lodges has welcomed generations of travellers to Tanzania's most accessible parks with cliff-top lodges at Lake Manyara and Ngorongoro and a vast Serengeti camp featuring regional craftsmanship and dependable service.

groups.name: Lemala Camps & Lodges
groups.shortDescription: Intimate seasonal camps positioned for migration viewing, plus a permanent lodge on the Ngorongoro rim.
groups.description: Lemala Camps & Lodges specialises in small, stylish tented camps that follow the Great Migration. Canvas suites feature proper beds, en-suite bathrooms and private verandas for safari purists who want excellent locations without sacrificing comfort.

groups.name: Sanctuary Retreats
groups.shortDescription: Boutique camps and lodges with personalised service, from crater highlands to private Serengeti concessions.
groups.description: Sanctuary Retreats operates a hand-picked portfolio of luxury camps and lodges designed for discerning travellers seeking privacy and tailored experiences across Ngorongoro, the Serengeti and Zanzibar.

groups.name: Tanganyika Wilderness Camps
groups.shortDescription: Owner-operated camps in Tanzania's wildest western parks — Katavi, Mahale and Gombe.
groups.description: Tanganyika Wilderness Camps offers an authentic, off-the-beaten-track safari in Tanzania's remote western circuit with fly-in camps in Katavi and lakeside lodges for chimpanzee trekking on Lake Tanganyika.

groups.name: &Beyond
groups.shortDescription: Globally acclaimed ultra-luxury lodges and private islands delivering exceptional guiding and conservation impact.
groups.description: &Beyond operates iconic lodges in the Serengeti and Ngorongoro highlands plus the exclusive Mnemba Island off Zanzibar. Their lodges combine refined design, expert guiding and a deep commitment to land and community conservation.

groups.name: Great Plains Conservation
groups.shortDescription: Conservation-first luxury camps founded by filmmakers, offering intimate stays on private conservancies.
groups.description: Great Plains Conservation creates low-impact, high-value safari experiences on exclusive-use conservancies. Their Tanzania and Kenya properties deliver exceptional wildlife viewing with a strong conservation and community mandate.

groups.name: Nomad Tanzania
groups.shortDescription: Characterful seasonal camps with exceptional locations and a genuine, unpretentious safari atmosphere.
groups.description: Nomad Tanzania operates a collection of stylish, owner-run tented camps in prime wildlife areas. Known for warm hospitality and excellent guiding, Nomad camps appeal to travellers seeking authenticity without compromising on comfort.

groups.name: Sopa Lodges
groups.shortDescription: Distinctive thatched lodges in prime park locations, ideal for families and group safaris.
groups.description: Sopa Lodges offers comfortable, full-service safari lodges across Tanzania's northern and southern circuits. Properties feature generous rooms, swimming pools and reliable access to major national parks at excellent value.

groups.name: Governors' Camp Collection
groups.shortDescription: Legendary Mara riverfront camps with decades of safari heritage on Kenya's finest conservancies.
groups.description: Governors' Camp Collection includes the original Governors' Camp on the Mara River plus Little Governors', Private Governors' and Loldia House on Lake Naivasha. A cornerstone of Kenyan safari history with outstanding wildlife access.

groups.name: Sarova Hotels
groups.shortDescription: Established Kenyan safari lodges and city hotels with dependable service across premier wildlife areas.
groups.description: Sarova operates game lodges in the Masai Mara, Amboseli and Samburu plus city hotels in Nairobi and Mombasa. Ideal for groups and first-time safari guests seeking trusted hospitality in prime locations.

groups.name: Porini Camps
groups.shortDescription: Low-impact eco-camps on private conservancies with exclusive game viewing and community partnerships.
groups.description: Porini Camps by Gamewatchers Safaris operates intimate tented camps on private conservancies adjoining Amboseli, Masai Mara and Samburu. Guests enjoy uncrowded game drives and direct support for local Maasai and Samburu communities.

groups.name: Heritage Hotels Kenya
groups.shortDescription: Historic properties including Mount Kenya Safari Club and Mara Intrepids with timeless East African charm.
groups.description: Heritage Hotels manages some of Kenya's most storied properties from the Fairmont Mount Kenya Safari Club to coastal resorts and Mara safari lodges, blending colonial elegance with modern comfort.

groups.name: Volcanoes Safaris
groups.shortDescription: Pioneering gorilla and chimpanzee lodge safaris in Uganda and Rwanda's volcanic highlands.
groups.description: Volcanoes Safaris pioneered gorilla tourism with luxury lodges at Bwindi and Queen Elizabeth in Uganda and at Virunga volcanoes in Rwanda. Their lodges combine exceptional primate encounters with community conservation.

groups.name: Wilderness Rwanda
groups.shortDescription: Architectural masterpieces for gorilla trekking — Bisate Lodge and Magashi Camp in Rwanda's volcanic forests.
groups.description: Wilderness Rwanda operates Bisate Lodge near Volcanoes National Park and Magashi Camp in Akagera. These design-led properties offer once-in-a-lifetime gorilla encounters with exceptional cuisine, spa and conservation programmes.
